user_query: show me anomaly routes departing from england in january
user_intent_summary: Identify anomalous routes originating from England during January.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains alarm events with departure country and month. Filtered for England (regno unito) departures in January (01). Grouped by route (departure and arrival airports) to detect anomalous routes. Volume metric is 'tot' (alarms count).

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains transit events with departure country and month. Filtered for England (regno unito) departures in January (01). Grouped by route (departure and arrival airports) to detect anomalous routes. Volume metric is 'allarmati' (flagged travelers count).
